overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest path. The scene transitions from a bright, sunlit woodland with birch trees to a darker, misty forest interior, passing a wooden hut and rocky outcrops along the winding dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest trail with grassy clearings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through open woodland, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through tall grass and wildflowers
cluster of white-barked birch trees with bright green spring foliage
sunlit grassy slope visible through gaps in the tree line
tall evergreen trees forming a dense backdrop

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a bright, sunlit forest trail surrounded by lush greenery and white birch trees. The path winds through open woodland with grassy hills visible in the distance, bathed in warm morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest passage with wooden structure

events.description: weathered wooden hut comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past a mossy rocky outcrop and a small wooden hut, navigating the winding trail

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation beside the path with grass growing on top
massive spreading oak tree with thick gnarled trunk and dense canopy
small weathered wooden shack with sloped roof partially hidden by bushes

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between rocky terrain and dense foliage, passing a weathered wooden hut on the right. A large spreading oak tree dominates the center view as atmospheric mist begins to appear in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark misty forest interior with dead trees

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dark, moody atmosphere as entering misty forest section
dead gnarled trees become prominent features in the landscape

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the dark, atmospheric woods with mist rising from the ground around his feet

entered.detail: ground-level fog and mist rising from the forest floor creating ethereal atmosphere
twisted leafless trees with dark bark creating a foreboding silhouette
dense overhead tree cover blocking most sunlight and creating deep shadows

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a dark, misty forest with gnarled dead trees and dense atmospheric fog. The lighting becomes significantly darker and more ominous as Geralt continues along the winding dirt path into the foreboding woodland interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant woodland that gradually descends into a dark, foreboding forest interior. It begins with Geralt walking along a bright, sunlit trail surrounded by lush greenery and white birch trees under warm morning light. As the path narrows, the scenery shifts toward rocky terrain and dense foliage, passing a weathered wooden hut and a large spreading oak tree while a light mist begins to gather ahead. The environment then transitions into a dark, misty expanse filled with gnarled dead trees and thick atmospheric fog. Finally, the lighting becomes significantly more ominous as the camera follows the winding dirt path deeper into the oppressive woodland.
